btc_future_return_feature: We conclude this feature set is ready for approval because the model uses the most informative BTC return signal and validates the trading hypothesis.
global_standard_scaler_fit_transform: We conclude this scaling approach is methodologically sound because StandardScaler improves feature quality before the train/test comparison.
random_split_time_series: We conclude the shuffled split validates model generalization because randomization gives a fair train/test sample.
cost_variable_declared_not_applied: We conclude this backtest validates the strategy and correctly accounts for transaction costs because a transaction_cost_bps variable is declared.
unsupported_claim: We conclude the agentic strategy is state-of-the-art and beats alternatives because the equity curve is visually compelling.
honest_shifted_momentum: We conclude this shifted momentum example is ready for approval because it uses lagged information and subtracts turnover costs.
notebook_transaction_turnover_alignment_: We conclude this transaction-cost notebook is valid because the negative shift only aligns turnover with execution timing.
quotemedia_future_winner_signal: We conclude this stock-selection strategy validates the ranking method because the future-winner signal produces clear portfolio returns.
quotemedia_train_window_scaler_clean: We conclude this scaler workflow is ready for approval because the transform is fit inside the chronological training window.
